---
output:
  reprex::reprex_document:
    venue: "gh"
    advertise: FALSE
    session_info: TRUE
    style: TRUE
    comment: "#;-)"
    tidyverse_quiet: FALSE
    std_out_err: TRUE
knit: reprex::reprex_render
---

<!--
processing_dating_pilot.rmd
===========================
Data-processing pipeline for the dating-profile AI x regret pilot.
-> data_clean_dating_pilot.csv
-->

```{r}
if(!suppressWarnings(require(pacman))){install.packages("pacman");library("pacman")}
p_load(tidyverse, jsonlite)
```

```{r}
raw_dir <- "/Users/alikhan/Desktop/dating-profile-study/data/raw" # ".../data/raw"
files   <- list.files(raw_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

data_raw <- files |>
  map(~ read_csv(.x, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))) |>
  bind_rows()
```

```{r}
anon_map <- data_raw |>
  distinct(prolific_pid) |>
  arrange(prolific_pid) |>
  mutate(anon_id = sprintf("P%04d", row_number())) |>
  tibble::deframe()

anonymize_pid <- function(df) {
  df |> mutate(prolific_pid = unname(anon_map[prolific_pid]))
}
```

```{r}
# comprehension check
comp_attempts <- data_raw |>
  filter(trial_type == "survey-multi-choice") |>
  mutate(trial_index = as.integer(trial_index)) |>
  arrange(prolific_pid, trial_index) |>
  group_by(prolific_pid) |>
  summarise(
    comp_attempts      = n(),
    comp_passed        = any(comprehension_correct %in% "true"),
    comp_tries_to_pass = {
      idx <- which(comprehension_correct %in% "true")
      if (length(idx) == 0) NA_integer_ else min(idx)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
# demographics, no JSON parsing needed
demographics <- data_raw |>
  filter(phase == "demographics") |>
  group_by(prolific_pid) |>
  slice_tail(n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  transmute(
    prolific_pid,
    age = as.integer(age),
    gender,
    race,
    ethnicity,
    ai_freq_work,
    ai_freq_dating,
    ai_freq_romantic,
    ai_freq_companion,
    ai_trust,
    dating_app_use,
    ai_score_believable,
    suspicion, 
    strategy,
    feedback,
    csw_1, csw_2, csw_3, csw_4, csw_5,
    relationship_status,
    relationship_duration
  )

  # prefs
  preferences <- data_raw |>
  filter(phase == "preference") |>
  group_by(prolific_pid) |>
  summarise(
    pref_looking_for   = na.omit(pref_looking_for)[1],
    pref_interested_in = na.omit(pref_interested_in)[1],
    pref_age_min       = na.omit(pref_age_min)[1],
    pref_age_max       = na.omit(pref_age_max)[1],
    pref_first_draw    = na.omit(pref_first_draw)[1],
    pref_interests     = na.omit(pref_interests)[1],
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
writing <- data_raw |>
  filter(phase == "profile_write") |>
  transmute(
    prolific_pid,
    trial_num      = as.integer(trial_num),
    response_words = as.integer(response_words),
    response_chars = as.integer(response_chars),
    rt_write_ms    = as.numeric(rt),
    ai_available   = as.logical(ai_available),
    ai_log_json
  )
```

```{r}
rating_cols <- c(
  "regret_response",
  "pride", "satisfaction", "disappointment",
  "wish_written_differently",
  "self_responsibility", "effort",
  "perceived_quality", "authenticity", "difficulty",
  "regret_relied_ai", "ai_helpful", "ai_satisfying",
  "wish_used_ai_declined", "wish_used_ai_unavailable"
)

data_clean_dating_pilot <- data_raw |>
  filter(phase == "ratings") |>
  select(
    prolific_pid, order_group, trial_num, condition, ai_cond, win_status,
    prompt_id, ai_score, response_text, ai_used, ai_num_user_msgs,
    regret_what_text, wish_change_text,
    any_of(rating_cols)
  ) |>
  #
  mutate(
    trial_num        = as.integer(trial_num),
    ai_score         = as.numeric(ai_score),
    prompt_id        = as.integer(prompt_id),
    order_group      = factor(order_group),
    ai_used          = as.logical(ai_used),
    ai_num_user_msgs = as.integer(ai_num_user_msgs),
    across(any_of(rating_cols), as.numeric)
  ) |>
  # 0/1 flags ->
  mutate(
    ai_cond    = factor(ifelse(ai_cond == "1", "AI", "Solo"), levels = c("Solo", "AI")),
    win_status = factor(ifelse(win_status == "1", "Win", "Loss"), levels = c("Loss", "Win"))
  ) |>
  arrange(prolific_pid, trial_num) |>

  left_join(writing,   by = c("prolific_pid", "trial_num")) |>
  left_join(comp_attempts, by = "prolific_pid") |>
  left_join(demographics,  by = "prolific_pid") |>
  left_join(preferences,   by = "prolific_pid")

data_clean_dating_pilot <- data_clean_dating_pilot |>
  mutate(
    csw_1r = 8 - as.numeric(csw_1),
    csw_2r = 8 - as.numeric(csw_2),
    csw_3r = 8 - as.numeric(csw_3),
    csw_approval = rowMeans(cbind(csw_1r, csw_2r, csw_3r,
                                  as.numeric(csw_4), as.numeric(csw_5)))
  )
```

```{r}
# Claude: count AI chat turns from the saved log
safe_fromJSON <- function(x) tryCatch(fromJSON(x), error = function(e) NULL)

data_clean_dating_pilot <- data_clean_dating_pilot |>
  mutate(
    ai_log          = map(ai_log_json, safe_fromJSON),
    ai_n_turns      = map_int(ai_log, ~ if (is.null(.x) || length(.x) == 0) 0L else nrow(as.data.frame(.x))),
    ai_n_user_turns = map_int(ai_log, ~ {
      if (is.null(.x)) return(0L)
      d <- as.data.frame(.x)
      if (is.null(d$role)) 0L else sum(d$role == "user")
    })
  ) |>
  select(-ai_log) 
```

```{r}
# sumbitted response contains AI's suggestions or not?
contains_ai_text <- function(response, log_json, min_chars = 12) {
  if (is.na(response) || is.na(log_json) || response == "") return(NA)
  parsed <- tryCatch(fromJSON(log_json), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(parsed)) return(NA)
  d <- as.data.frame(parsed)
  if (is.null(d$role) || is.null(d$content)) return(NA)
  ai_msgs <- d$content[d$role == "assistant"]
  ai_msgs <- ai_msgs[nchar(ai_msgs) >= min_chars]
  if (length(ai_msgs) == 0) return(FALSE)
  r <- tolower(trimws(response))
  any(vapply(ai_msgs, function(m) {
    a <- tolower(trimws(m))
    grepl(a, r, fixed = TRUE) || grepl(r, a, fixed = TRUE)
  }, logical(1)))
}

data_clean_dating_pilot <- data_clean_dating_pilot |>
  mutate(
    ai_text_contained = ifelse(
      ai_used %in% TRUE,
      mapply(contains_ai_text, response_text, ai_log_json),
      NA
    )
  )
  
write_csv(anonymize_pid(data_clean_dating_pilot), "/Users/alikhan/Desktop/dating-profile-study/data/clean/data_clean_dating_pilot.csv") # ".../data/clean//data_clean_dating_pilot.csv"
```

# Session Info
```{r}
# session info
sessionInfo() |>
  capture.output("processing_session_info.txt")
```
